de.uka.ilkd.key.pp

Enum LogicPrinter.MarkType

  • java.lang.Object
    • java.lang.Enum<LogicPrinter.MarkType>
      • de.uka.ilkd.key.pp.LogicPrinter.MarkType
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    Serializable, Comparable<LogicPrinter.MarkType>
    Enclosing class:
    LogicPrinter

    private static enum LogicPrinter.MarkType
extends Enum<LogicPrinter.MarkType>

    • Enum Constant Summary

      Enum Constants 
      Enum Constant and Description
      MARK_END_FIRST_STMT
      Mark the end of the first executable statement.
      MARK_END_JAVABLOCK
      Mark the end of a java block.
      MARK_END_KEYWORD
      Mark the end of a keyword.
      MARK_END_SUB
      Mark the end of a subterm.
      MARK_END_UPDATE
      Mark the end of an update.
      MARK_MODPOSTBL
      Mark the need for a ModalityPositionTable.
      MARK_START_FIRST_STMT
      Mark the start of the first executable statement.
      MARK_START_JAVABLOCK
      Mark the beginning of a java block.
      MARK_START_KEYWORD
      Mark the beginning of a keyword.
      MARK_START_SUB
      Mark the start of a subterm.
      MARK_START_TERM
      Mark the beginning of a term
      MARK_START_UPDATE
      Mark the start of an update.

    • Enum Constant Detail

      • MARK_START_TERM

        public static final LogicPrinter.MarkType MARK_START_TERM
        Mark the beginning of a term

      • MARK_START_SUB

        public static final LogicPrinter.MarkType MARK_START_SUB
        Mark the start of a subterm. Needed for PositionTable construction.

      • MARK_END_SUB

        public static final LogicPrinter.MarkType MARK_END_SUB
        Mark the end of a subterm. Needed for PositionTable construction.

      • MARK_START_FIRST_STMT

        public static final LogicPrinter.MarkType MARK_START_FIRST_STMT
        Mark the start of the first executable statement. Needed for PositionTable construction.

      • MARK_END_FIRST_STMT

        public static final LogicPrinter.MarkType MARK_END_FIRST_STMT
        Mark the end of the first executable statement. Needed for PositionTable construction.

      • MARK_MODPOSTBL

        public static final LogicPrinter.MarkType MARK_MODPOSTBL
        Mark the need for a ModalityPositionTable. The next startTerm mark will construct a ModalityPositionTable instead of the usual PositionTable. Needed for PositionTable construction.

      • MARK_START_UPDATE

        public static final LogicPrinter.MarkType MARK_START_UPDATE
        Mark the start of an update.

      • MARK_END_UPDATE

        public static final LogicPrinter.MarkType MARK_END_UPDATE
        Mark the end of an update.

      • MARK_START_KEYWORD

        public static final LogicPrinter.MarkType MARK_START_KEYWORD
        Mark the beginning of a keyword.

      • MARK_END_KEYWORD

        public static final LogicPrinter.MarkType MARK_END_KEYWORD
        Mark the end of a keyword.

      • MARK_START_JAVABLOCK

        public static final LogicPrinter.MarkType MARK_START_JAVABLOCK
        Mark the beginning of a java block.

      • MARK_END_JAVABLOCK

        public static final LogicPrinter.MarkType MARK_END_JAVABLOCK
        Mark the end of a java block.

    • Method Detail

      • values

        public static LogicPrinter.MarkType[] values()
        Returns an array containing the constants of this enum type, in the order they are declared. This method may be used to iterate over the constants as follows: 
        for (LogicPrinter.MarkType c : LogicPrinter.MarkType.values())
    System.out.println(c);
        Returns:
        an array containing the constants of this enum type, in the order they are declared

      • valueOf

        public static LogicPrinter.MarkType valueOf(String name)
        Returns the enum constant of this type with the specified name. The string must match exactly an identifier used to declare an enum constant in this type. (Extraneous whitespace characters are not permitted.)
        Parameters:
        name - the name of the enum constant to be returned.
        Returns:
        the enum constant with the specified name
        Throws:
        IllegalArgumentException - if this enum type has no constant with the specified name
        NullPointerException - if the argument is null
